{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech box
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri]] used a colorless sigil around an [[Aethertech box]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|An [[Aethertech box]] contains the [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
